Generated from `cargo doc --no-deps -p nemo-relay -p nemo-relay-adaptive -p nemo-relay-ffi`.

<pre className="rust-signature"><code dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{"__html": "pub struct HotCache &#123;\n    pub plan: <a href=\"https://doc.rust-lang.org/1.93.0/core/option/enum.Option.html\">Option</a>&lt;<a href=\"../plan/struct-executionplan\">ExecutionPlan</a>&gt;,\n    pub trie: <a href=\"https://doc.rust-lang.org/1.93.0/core/option/enum.Option.html\">Option</a>&lt;<a href=\"../../trie/data_models/struct-predictiontrienode\">PredictionTrieNode</a>&gt;,\n    pub agent_hints_default: <a href=\"https://doc.rust-lang.org/1.93.0/core/option/enum.Option.html\">Option</a>&lt;<a href=\"../metadata/struct-agenthints\">AgentHints</a>&gt;,\n    pub acg_profiles: <a href=\"https://doc.rust-lang.org/1.93.0/std/collections/hash/map/struct.HashMap.html\">HashMap</a>&lt;<a href=\"https://doc.rust-lang.org/1.93.0/alloc/string/struct.String.html\">String</a>, <a href=\"../../acg/stability/struct-stabilityanalysisresult\">StabilityAnalysisResult</a>&gt;,\n    pub acg_profile_observation_counts: <a href=\"https://doc.rust-lang.org/1.93.0/std/collections/hash/map/struct.HashMap.html\">HashMap</a>&lt;<a href=\"https://doc.rust-lang.org/1.93.0/alloc/string/struct.String.html\">String</a>, <a href=\"https://doc.rust-lang.org/1.93.0/std/primitive.u32.html\">u32</a>&gt;,\n    pub acg_stability: <a href=\"https://doc.rust-lang.org/1.93.0/core/option/enum.Option.html\">Option</a>&lt;<a href=\"../../acg/stability/struct-stabilityanalysisresult\">StabilityAnalysisResult</a>&gt;,\n    pub acg_observation_count: <a href=\"https://doc.rust-lang.org/1.93.0/std/primitive.u32.html\">u32</a>,\n&#125;"}} /></pre>

In-memory cache of adaptive artifacts needed on the hot path.

The adaptive runtime keeps this structure in an [`std::sync::RwLock`](https://doc.rust-lang.org/1.93.0/std/sync/poison/rwlock/struct.RwLock.html) so intercepts and event-processing tasks can exchange recently learned plans, trie state, and Adaptive Cache Governor (ACG) summaries without hitting the configured backend on every request.

## Fields

### `plan: Option<ExecutionPlan>`

Current execution plan used for tool parallelism hints.

### `trie: Option<PredictionTrieNode>`

Prediction trie used to derive default latency sensitivity hints.

### `agent_hints_default: Option<AgentHints>`

Default agent-level hints computed from the prediction trie.

### `acg_profiles: HashMap<String, StabilityAnalysisResult>`

Per-profile ACG stability results keyed by derived profile identifier.

### `acg_profile_observation_counts: HashMap<String, u32>`

Observation counts corresponding to entries in [`Self::acg_profiles`](/reference/api/rust-library-reference/nemo-relay-adaptive/types/cache/struct-hotcache).

### `acg_stability: Option<StabilityAnalysisResult>`

Aggregate ACG stability result used for warm-first eligibility checks.

### `acg_observation_count: u32`

Observation count associated with [`Self::acg_stability`](/reference/api/rust-library-reference/nemo-relay-adaptive/types/cache/struct-hotcache).
